prs.title: feat: implement `as` option for populate to assign results to an alternate path and add tests.
Add github and leetcode fetching files for the user
Punctuationremover.py
prs.body: This Python program removes punctuation from a user-entered string. It defines a list of common punctuation marks, then checks each character in the input. If a character isn’t punctuation, it’s added to a new string. Finally, it displays the input text with all punctuation removed.

prs.title: Averagecalculater.py
prs.body: This Python program calculates the average of user-entered numbers. It continuously prompts for numbers, adding each valid entry to a list. Entering a blank line ends the input process, at which point the program calculates and displays the average. If no numbers were entered, it notifies the user that there’s no average to calculate. Thank You

prs.title: Create CalculatorApp.py
prs.body:
The Calculators are been invented as an item which saves the most of our time of calculating complex numericals and after the simplification of angled calculations as sin, cos etc it became even more easy for the human kind to segrigate and organise the calculations more oftenly in simpler way  My Calculator is designed to code the calculations of complex mathematical numericals which include angles also, Please do consider my Contribution. Thank You

---

**Give a clear description of what you have added or modified.**  
*Describe your changes here.*

---

#### Type of Change
**Select the type of change:**  
- [x] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [x] Code style update (formatting, local variables)
- [x] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [x] This change requires a documentation update

---

#### How Has This Been Tested?
**Describe how your changes have been tested.**  
*Describe your testing process here.*

- [x] I have described my testing process.

---

#### Checklist
**Please confirm the following:**  
- [x] My code follows the guidelines of this project.
- [x] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [x] I have commented my code, particularly wherever it was hard to understand.
- [x] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation.
- [x] My changes generate no new warnings.
- [x] I have added things that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [x] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules.
